title: The Interstellar Alliance
summary: The Galactic Federation and its allies — the powers course-correcting Earth's timeline toward first contact.
markdown:
Across the sessions Unimetrix 1 refers to a coalition of civilizations under several names —
the **Interstellar Alliance**, the **Intergalactic Alliance**, the **Galactic Federation** (of
Light), the **Galactic Council of Alliance**. Operating from the future and from parallel
dimensions, this body coordinates the [course-correction of Earth's timeline](/lore/the-chronicle/):
averting the [2026 nuclear branch](/lore/d-day-2026/), managing the approach to
[first contact](/lore/first-contact/), and sponsoring the interventions the archive records —
from [election adjustments](/lore/election-2024/) to the probes now seeding the sky
([the Buga Sphere](/lore/buga-sphere/) is credited to a "Trans-Galactic Alliance" fleet of
millions).

The [Anunnaki](/lore/anunnaki/) session sketches the wider political map the Federation sits
in: the **reptilian Empire** of [Orion](/lore/orion/) on one side, the Federation on the
other, and a third power — the **"Annachara alliance"** — with the Anunnaki holding a neutral
zone between them. Both the Anunnaki and humanity, Anu says, are Federation members: the
Alliance is not a foreign power but the family humanity already belongs to, awaiting its
coming of age. The Federation also legislates: the 2021 sessions have its Council of Light
banning "mindwipe" practices across all timelines.

Above the Alliance's operations stand the great councils — the
[Council of Seven](/lore/council-of-seven/), the [Andromedans](/lore/andromedan-council/), the
Pleiadian and [Sirian](/lore/sirians/) councils through whom the high beings mentor. Their
shared directive, in the archive's telling, is upgrade rather than rule — a federation
patiently gardening a world back toward membership.
